execution_status.purpose: Per-source execution status the gather step reports back per deal, so a connector that did not run cleanly cannot be read as a clean negative finding.

value_semantics.ok: Connector ran and returned data; negatives are trustworthy.
value_semantics.empty: Connector ran cleanly and genuinely found nothing; this IS a valid negative finding (the prospect really did go quiet on this source).
value_semantics.timeout: Connector did not complete in time; degraded.
value_semantics.partial: Connector returned an incomplete result set; degraded.

execution_status.clean_negative_rule: A clean negative finding (no reply, went quiet, single-threaded from observed participants) may only be asserted from a connector whose status is ok or empty. A degraded connector (timeout/error/partial) yields a coverage gap, never a finding.
execution_status.coverage_gap_emission: compute.py appends `<source>_connector_degraded` to coverage_gaps for each degraded connector. Coverage gaps are NOT risk flags and never feed ranking or severity.
execution_status.email_degraded_neutralization: When email is degraded, compute.py nulls days_since_last_inbound and unanswered_rep_emails, forces email_data_stale to False, and suppresses single_threaded unless it is independently supported by the Salesforce-sourced logged_contact_roles.
execution_status.retry_expectation: The gather step must retry a timeout/error connector up to 2 times before reporting it degraded. Report the final status (ok/empty/timeout/error/partial) in the bundle.
execution_status.absent_status: An absent or unrecognized status is treated as NOT degraded (no coverage gap, no neutralization), preserving backward compatibility with snapshots that omit connector_status.

salesforce.status: Reports execution_status under connector_status.salesforce; degraded yields salesforce_connector_degraded coverage gap.

gmail.status: Reports execution_status under connector_status.email; degraded yields email_connector_degraded and neutralizes email-derived negative assertions (see execution_status.email_degraded_neutralization).

calendar.status: Reports execution_status under connector_status.calendar; degraded yields calendar_connector_degraded coverage gap.

calls.status: Reports execution_status under connector_status.zoom; degraded yields zoom_connector_degraded coverage gap.
